common.no_registered_versions: No versions registered. Perform a save on server.
common.save_modal_desc: Task states will be saved and an immutable snapshot will be created for bank compliance auditing.
common.minor_increment: Minor Increment — Visual adjustments or minor fixes
common.major_increment: Major Increment — Deep restructuring of the process
common.keep_version: Keep version — Editing without governance changes
common.change_description_placeholder: E.g., Modified signature flow or moved approval nodes
common.confirm_restore_desc: Are you sure you want to restore the workflow to version {{version}}? This will load the selected version and automatically save it as a new increment in the database for auditing.
common.warning_orphan_forms_desc: Cannot sign or save. There are forms in the global library that are not linked to any task:
common.warning_orphan_forms_help: * Link these forms to a step or delete them in the "Form Library" tab before continuing.

forms.title: Forms
forms.select_or_create: Select or create a form in the sidebar to edit it.
forms.new_disclaimer_text: Please complete all required fields accurately. The information provided in this form will be used for vendor onboarding, compliance review, and contract management purposes. Inaccurate or incomplete information may delay the procurement process.
forms.duplicate_question_error: This question title already exists in this form.
forms.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the form "{{name}}"?
forms.delete_form_questions_confirm:
This form contains questions. Do you want to delete it?
"{{name}}"
forms.delete_question_confirm:
This question contains information. Do you want to delete it?
"{{name}}"
forms.delete_question_warning_dependencies: The following questions depend on this answer. Their visibility conditions will be removed and you will have to recreate them:
forms.cannot_delete_linked_option_desc: Option "{{name}}" cannot be deleted because it is being used as a visibility condition in another question. Unlink the condition first.
forms.cannot_modify_linked_options_desc: The following options cannot be deleted or modified because they are linked as conditions: {{name}}. Unlink the corresponding conditions first.
forms.bulk_add_placeholder: Type or paste your options here (one per line)...
forms.bulk_add_help: Each line will become a dropdown option.

simulation.title: 🔌 Simulation of External Responses
simulation.description: This form has questions that depend on other forms. Modify these simulation responses to see changes in real time:

tasks.empty_state: Select a task from the menu or click on a node in the canvas.
tasks.select_global_forms: Select one or more global forms.
tasks.activation_desc: Select a question from a previous form to condition when this task is executed.
tasks.skip_desc: Select a question from a previous form to decide when this task should be skipped.
tasks.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the task "{{name}}"?
tasks.delete_task_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the task "{{name}}"? It contains configurations (approvers, forms, or conditions) that will be permanently lost.
tasks.no_linked_forms_yet: No forms linked to this step yet.
tasks.unlink_form_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink the form "{{name}}"?
tasks.unlink_form_warning_dependencies: The following tasks depend on this form. Their activation conditions will be removed and you will have to recreate them:
tasks.all_forms_assigned_desc: All global forms of the workflow are already linked to other steps. Create a new one in the 'Forms' tab to link it here.
tasks.no_forms_created_desc: Go to the 'Forms' tab to create your first corporate form.
tasks.task_type_iso: Information Security Officer — Managed by ISO
tasks.system_step_info: Request Submit is a mandatory system step. Its name and position cannot be changed. It represents the initial submission of the request by the requester and does not require approvers.
tasks.system_step_type_desc: This is a mandatory system step. The requester submits the request and no approval is required.
tasks.dynamic_approvers_placeholder: Approvers will be dynamically selected during the execution of this workflow.
tasks.iso_approvers_placeholder: This step requires specialized oversight and will be reviewed directly by the bank's Information Security Officers.
tasks.expiration_and_notifications_desc: Advanced settings for task expiration, automatic reminders, and automated email alerts.
tasks.all_approvers_required_label: Requires approval from ALL assigned approvers?
tasks.expiration_days_desc: Defines the maximum business days before this task expires automatically.
tasks.send_mail_label: Send email alert when task is assigned
tasks.reminders_placeholder: E.g., Daily, Every 3 days, etc. (empty to disable)
tasks.validation_form_dep_same_task_not_linked: Requires "{{depFormTitle}}" (must be linked first in this task)
tasks.search_questions_placeholder: Search by question, form or task...
tasks.no_questions_matching: No questions found matching your search.
tasks.overwrite_condition_canvas_tooltip: Approvers can be overwritten if condition is met
tasks.skip_task_opt_desc: This step is skipped: flow continues to the next step.
tasks.overwrite_approver_opt_desc: Replace the step's approvers with the ones defined below.

dashboard.title: Workflows
dashboard.subtitle: Efficiently organize, manage, and monitor all your business workflows from a single, centralized dashboard.
dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow?
dashboard.workflow_settings_desc: Configure the governance and responsibility assignment for this workflow.
